basis: Equal-weight z-score blend of run differential and winning %, season-to-date.
mmr_basis: Dynamic layer: 14d expected-vs-actual (Elo expectancy on composite z, scale 10), upset-weighted, 7d half-life, K=0.18, clamp 0.60z; tier flips need boundary +/-0.05 for 2 consecutive runs, one step per run. Display-only starting-guess parameters; the model never reads tiers.
movements: PIT promoted: Below Average -> Average (eff +0.11, mmr -0.07)
CWS demoted: Above Average -> Average (eff +0.24, mmr +0.07)
PHI demoted: Above Average -> Average (eff +0.23, mmr +0.11)
AZ promoted: Below Average -> Average (eff -0.07, mmr +0.01)
TOR promoted: Below Average -> Average (eff -0.07, mmr +0.17)
HOU promoted: Poor -> Below Average (eff -0.59, mmr +0.07)
DET demoted: Below Average -> Poor (eff -0.87, mmr -0.11)
SF promoted: Poor -> Below Average (eff -0.43, mmr +0.60)
